version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Initial draft covering scope, fees, expenses, IP, termination, and governing law.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: The Consultant shall provide strategic advisory services as described in Exhibit A. Services shall be performed remotely unless otherwise agreed in writing.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.text: The Client shall pay the Consultant a monthly retainer of $15,000, due on the first business day of each month. Additional project-based fees shall be agreed in advance.

clauses.title: Expenses
clauses.text: The Client shall reimburse the Consultant for all reasonable and pre-approved travel, lodging, and meal expenses incurred in connection with the Services within thirty (30) days of submission of expense reports.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All work product created by the Consultant under this Agreement shall be owned by the Client. The Consultant retains no rights in any deliverables.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days written notice. The Client shall pay for all services rendered through the termination date.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

version_history.author: Counterparty
version_history.change_summary: Client adds confidentiality clause and modifies termination notice period.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: The Consultant shall provide strategic advisory services as described in Exhibit A. Services shall be performed remotely unless otherwise agreed in writing.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.text: The Client shall pay the Consultant a monthly retainer of $15,000, due on the first business day of each month. Additional project-based fees shall be agreed in advance.

clauses.title: Expenses
clauses.text: The Client shall reimburse the Consultant for all reasonable and pre-approved travel, lodging, and meal expenses incurred in connection with the Services within thirty (30) days of submission of expense reports.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All work product created by the Consultant under this Agreement shall be owned by the Client. The Consultant retains no rights in any deliverables.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fourteen (14) days written notice. The Client shall pay for all services rendered through the termination date.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: The Consultant shall maintain the confidentiality of all Client proprietary information for a period of three (3) years from disclosure.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Consultant adds IP licensing clause allowing retained rights in pre-existing materials, and adds non-compete.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: The Consultant shall provide strategic advisory services as described in Exhibit A. Services shall be performed remotely unless otherwise agreed in writing.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.text: The Client shall pay the Consultant a monthly retainer of $15,000, due on the first business day of each month. Additional project-based fees shall be agreed in advance.

clauses.title: Expenses
clauses.text: The Client shall reimburse the Consultant for all reasonable and pre-approved travel, lodging, and meal expenses incurred in connection with the Services within thirty (30) days of submission of expense reports.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All work product created by the Consultant under this Agreement shall be owned by the Client. The Consultant retains no rights in any deliverables.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fourteen (14) days written notice. The Client shall pay for all services rendered through the termination date.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

clauses.title: Pre-Existing IP License
clauses.text: Notwithstanding Section 4, the Consultant shall retain all intellectual property rights in pre-existing materials, methodologies, frameworks, and tools. The Consultant grants the Client a perpetual, royalty-free, non-exclusive license to use such pre-existing materials solely as incorporated into deliverables, but the Consultant retains full ownership and unrestricted rights to reuse, sublicense, and commercialize all work product including derivative works.

clauses.title: Non-Compete
clauses.text: During the term of this Agreement and for six (6) months thereafter, the Consultant shall not provide substantially similar services to any direct competitor of the Client.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: The Consultant shall maintain the confidentiality of all Client proprietary information for a period of three (3) years from disclosure.

version_history.author: Counterparty
version_history.change_summary: Client requests liability limitation and indemnification provisions.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: The Consultant shall provide strategic advisory services as described in Exhibit A. Services shall be performed remotely unless otherwise agreed in writing.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.text: The Client shall pay the Consultant a monthly retainer of $15,000, due on the first business day of each month. Additional project-based fees shall be agreed in advance.

clauses.title: Expenses
clauses.text: The Client shall reimburse the Consultant for all reasonable and pre-approved travel, lodging, and meal expenses incurred in connection with the Services within thirty (30) days of submission of expense reports.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All work product created by the Consultant under this Agreement shall be owned by the Client. The Consultant retains no rights in any deliverables.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fourteen (14) days written notice. The Client shall pay for all services rendered through the termination date.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

clauses.title: Pre-Existing IP License
clauses.text: Notwithstanding Section 4, the Consultant shall retain all intellectual property rights in pre-existing materials, methodologies, frameworks, and tools. The Consultant grants the Client a perpetual, royalty-free, non-exclusive license to use such pre-existing materials solely as incorporated into deliverables, but the Consultant retains full ownership and unrestricted rights to reuse, sublicense, and commercialize all work product including derivative works.

clauses.title: Non-Compete
clauses.text: During the term of this Agreement and for six (6) months thereafter, the Consultant shall not provide substantially similar services to any direct competitor of the Client.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: The Consultant shall maintain the confidentiality of all Client proprietary information for a period of three (3) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: The Consultant's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the fees paid in the six (6) months preceding the claim.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: The Consultant shall indemnify the Client against third-party claims arising from the Consultant's negligence or willful misconduct.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Consultant adds force majeure and entire agreement clauses.
